name: Roast Chicken I
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the chicken into serving pieces and wash them thoroughly. Dry.
2. Brush the roasting pan with butter and lay the pieces skin side down.
3. Sprinkle each piece with salt, pepper, oregano, parsley, and chopped garlic.
4. Dot each piece with small dabs of butter.
5. Sprinkle each piece with red wine vinegar.
6. Bake in a preheated oven at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 1 hour.
